mapper.select: SELECT review_id as reviewId , product_id as productId , nickname , review_date as reviewDate , rating , skin_tone as skinTone , skin_type as skinType , skin_raw as skinRaw , satisfaction , purchase_option as purchaseOption , review_text as reviewText , helpful , sentiment FROM t_review WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY review_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
